_doc: LLM routing configuration for constraint audits. The worker reads this file with priority: file > env var > code default.
_comment: Set strategy to 'precision' to use Claude Sonnet (high quality, ~$0.30/task), 'balanced' for GPT-4o mini (~$0.15/task), or 'aggressive' for HuggingFace Llama (~$0.02/task)
